objective: Provide a permanent governance anchor for automated Overlord Sweep generated artifact pull requests.
scope_boundary: Authorize Overlord Sweep generated artifact PR branches named automation/issue-503-overlord-sweep-<date>-<run_id>.
Limit generated PR write scope to graph, wiki, metrics, org compendium, and the generated execution-scope artifact.
Keep this issue open as long as the generated artifact PR workflow exists.
out_of_scope: Changing generated artifact content outside the Overlord Sweep workflow.
Bypassing required PR checks or branch protection.
Authorizing application source-code changes in generated artifact PRs.
research_summary: Issue #487 proved the artifact PR path after direct main pushes were blocked, but it was an incident issue. Generated artifact PRs need a durable issue-number anchor so governance-surface validation can resolve branch, plan, and execution-scope evidence on every run.

sprints.name: Generated artifact PR anchor
sprints.goal: Keep automated artifact PRs issue-backed without coupling them to a closed incident issue.
tasks: Generate artifact branch names with issue #503.
Restrict allowed write paths to generated artifact surfaces.
Cover branch and scope generation with deterministic tests.
acceptance_criteria: Generated execution scope allows only generated graph/wiki/metric/compendium paths and its own scope file.
Regression tests pass locally and in CI.

specialist_reviews.focus: Ensure generated artifact PRs stay issue-backed and bounded to generated outputs.
specialist_reviews.summary: The permanent issue anchor preserves existing governance-surface enforcement while avoiding reuse of a closed incident issue.

alternate_model_review.summary: The change extracts deterministic string/JSON generation from workflow shell into a unit-tested helper.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #503 authorizes generated artifact PR branch/scope metadata only, with write paths limited to generated artifact surfaces.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Keep issue #503 open and use its plan/scope evidence for generated artifact PR local-ci validation.

material_deviation_rules: If generated artifact PRs need to write any non-generated source path, stop and create a separate issue-backed implementation PR.
If local-ci cannot resolve issue #503 evidence, keep generated artifact PRs unmerged until the branch/scope helper is fixed.
